reasoning: John Morgan has a history of teasing runs for free publicity without ultimately running (as in 2018). While he is establishing a new centrist party and there's a deadline of June 12, 2025, to affiliate with that party to run under its banner in 2026, simply changing his party registration does not require a formal campaign announcement. More importantly, Morgan explicitly stated in May 2025 that he could wait longer than Jason Pizzo (whose announcement is expected in September 2025) to open a campaign account due to his high name recognition. Therefore, an announcement before the short deadline of July 1, 2025 is highly unlikely, as he plans to wait and see how the field shapes up later in the year.
batch_queries: Will John Morgan announce his candidacy for Florida governor before July 1, 2025?
